title: Configure CRON_ENDPOINT in GitHub Actions production environment
body: The workflow expects CRON_ENDPOINT secret to be set in the 'production' environment. This should point to the deployed Vercel app URL (e.g., https://a-guy-educ.vercel.app or custom domain). The CRON_SECRET must also match the CRON_SECRET env var in the deployed application.
rationale: The validation guard now catches the missing secret, but the actual endpoint URL is never called until secrets are configured.
